texts.t002: Microprocessor-controlled automatic sliding doors — single, bi-parting, telescopic and hermetic hospital doors with radar and safety sensors, access-control integration and battery backup.
texts.t012: Bi-parting and single-slide operators with adjustable speed, hold-open and pharmacy (partial-open) modes.
texts.t013: Multi-leaf telescopic tracks that deliver maximum clear opening in tight façades.
texts.t014: Sealed sliding doors for OTs and ICUs with hygienic flush leaves and foot-switch/elbow activation.
texts.t015: Low-energy swing operators to automate existing doors for accessibility.
texts.t016: Can you automate my existing glass door?
texts.t017: In most cases yes — we retrofit operators onto existing frameless and framed glass doors after a site survey.
texts.t025: GI, aluminium, polycarbonate & India's only 100% Indian-make full-length transparent shutter.
texts.t026: Rapid roll PVC doors up to 100 RPM-class SIE40–SIE100 motors for hygiene, logistics and cold chain.
texts.t027: Insulated overhead sectional doors, stacking doors and residential garage automation with SIE16/36 openers.
texts.t028: Get a same-day recommendation for automatic doors
texts.t029: Share your opening size and a photo — our Mumbai engineering desk replies with the right system and budget.
